title: TKVM Enemies: Dark Knight
description: A dark knight boss fight, and arena (Made for FalchionMC)
body:
## Dark Knight
![Dark Knight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iFHcMRcF/images/4eb051ea9b23b7a72810d085881099ac3e22f08f.jpeg)
An extremely strong bossfight that is intended for netherite gear+.
- 800 HP with armor.
- Devestating combos that can kill a full HP netherite player.
- intelligent dodging and parrying

## Unholy Arena 

![Unholy Arena](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iFHcMRcF/images/f6c0d4b64531dfca27677e78ba842e4468cdc471.jpeg)

The Unholy Arena spawns in the nether, above lava now. (As of ver. 2.1.0)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_i6awnCXFTc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Modrinth (Should automatically download if downloaded mod via Launcher)
- [Epic Fight 20.14.16](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight/version/20.14.16-mc1.20.1-forge)
- [WOM](https://modrinth.com/mod/weapons-of-miracles/version/2.0.15-mc1.20.1-forge)
- [Epic Fight Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/epicfight-extra/version/1.1.9)
- [Epic Knights](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons/version/2kK9qUpx) (Tested on 10.11)
- [Epic Knights Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-addon) (Tested on 2.6)
- 
### Curseforge (Must download independently) 
- [Indestructible 20.12.0](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-indestructible/files/6915161) (REQUIRED: Config -> indestructible-client.toml -> replace_health_bar = 1 -> replace_health_bar = 0 , game WILL crash if you don't do this.)
- [EF : Resurrection 20.12.2hotfix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epicfight-resurrection/files/6931390)

You may use this in your modpack. 

##### _This mod is intended for my modpack, FalchionMC (In development...)_
